summary: Status Propagation & Role-Based View Testing Complete. All 4 role views (Admin, Sales, Customer, Vendor) verified for correct status labels and data privacy. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Status propagation fully implemented and tested. CUSTOMER_STATUS_MAP maps all internal statuses to customer-safe labels. Vendor orders API does NOT expose customer identity. Admin login uses /api/admin/auth/login endpoint.

admin_orders.orders_table: PASS - data-testid='orders-table' with columns Date, Order#, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment
admin_orders.order_drawer: PASS - DetailDrawer opens on row click
admin_orders.status_timeline: PASS - data-testid='drawer-timeline' found with timeline entries

customer_orders.status_column: PASS - Shows customer-safe labels: Processing, Confirmed, In Fulfillment, Completed
customer_orders.no_raw_statuses: PASS - No raw internal statuses (pending, created, paid, in_progress) visible
customer_orders.filter_dropdown: PASS - Has customer-safe options: Processing, Confirmed, In Fulfillment, Dispatched, Delivered, Completed
customer_orders.order_drawer: PASS - Status badge shows customer-safe label

vendor_orders.no_customer_identity: PASS - Table headers: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority - NO Customer column
vendor_orders.vendor_order_format: PASS - Vendor order numbers in VO-KON-ORD-xxx format
vendor_orders.sales_contact: PASS - Konekt Sales Contact section with name, phone, email
vendor_orders.base_price: PASS - Order summary shows Base Price

sales_orders.login: PASS - /api/admin/auth/login returns token for sales user
sales_orders.customer_column: PASS - Table shows Customer column with name and phone
sales_orders.status_column: PASS - Shows sales-appropriate labels: Paid, Pending, Created
sales_orders.order_drawer: PASS - Shows customer info, line items, financial summary

backend_api_tests.customer_orders_customer_status: PASS - Returns customer_status field with safe labels
backend_api_tests.customer_orders_no_raw_statuses: PASS - No raw internal statuses in customer_status
backend_api_tests.vendor_orders_no_customer_name: PASS - No customer_name field in vendor orders
backend_api_tests.sales_orders_full_status: PASS - Returns orders with customer info and status
backend_api_tests.admin_orders_list: PASS - Returns orders with full details
backend_api_tests.customer_status_map_coverage: PASS - All internal statuses mapped to safe labels
backend_api_tests.map_status_for_role: PASS - Returns correct mappings for all roles

mocked_apis_list: Resend email service - dry-run mode, logs to console instead of sending emails
